interpretation: Prior-only EV overlay validation for wallet_flow_ev_model used risk_adjusted threshold selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated policy was order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 5.8%, unfiltered same-day ROI 5.1%, and ROI lift 0.8%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 1/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown.
